next_steps: Perform lumbar puncture for CSF fungal, bacterial, and mycobacterial cultures, India ink, and Cryptococcal antigen
Send CSF for multiplex PCR (including HSV, VZV, Listeria, and M. tuberculosis)
Measure serum ACTH, morning cortisol, and 24-hour urinary free cortisol (if possible) or dexamethasone suppression test
Verify VNS model compatibility and prioritize MRI of the brain with gadolinium
Initiate empiric treatment for suspected fungal and listerial meningitis (e.g., amphotericin B, flucytosine, and ampicillin)
Obtain chest/abdominal CT scan with thin cuts to search for occult malignancy (e.g., source of ectopic ACTH)
